markdownRemark.excerpt: How do I get a cursor on every line of selected snippet in vscode ? How to search a text globally across the project ? Fonts Fira Code Has font ligatures and…
markdownRemark.html:
How do I get a cursor on every line of selected snippet in vscode ?

alt + shift + i

How to search a text globally across the project ?

cmd/ctrl + shift + f

Fonts

Fira Code

Has font ligatures and Open source

Cascadia Code

Windows terminal fonts
